title: Citrusy Middle Eastern Sirloin Steak Kebabs
description: Flaky, citrusy sirloin steak kebabs with a Middle Eastern twist, perfect for a post-workout meal. This dish is vegan-friendly when substituting the steak with portobello mushrooms or tofu.

ingredients.name: sirloin steak tips
ingredients.notes: or portobello mushrooms/tofu for vegan option

instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together lemon juice, olive oil, sumac, paprika, cumin, garlic, salt, and black pepper.
Add the sirloin steak tips (or portobello mushrooms/tofu) to the bowl and marinate for at least 30 minutes, or up to 2 hours in the refrigerator.
Preheat the grill to medium-high heat (400°F).
Thread the marinated steak (or mushrooms/tofu), red onion, and bell peppers onto skewers.
Grill the kebabs for 8-10 minutes per side, or until the steak reaches an internal temperature of 145°F for medium-rare.
Let the kebabs rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Serve the kebabs hot, garnished with additional sumac and lemon wedges if desired.
For vegan option, adjust cooking time according to the substitute ingredient's cooking instructions.
